Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this training, Dean is going to show you the anatomy and framework of the perfect application page. This is the perfect page choice for anything
over $1,000 tat may be best if you get someone on the phone to get them to commit. The whole purpose of this application page is to make your
event feel as exclusive as possible and only have the right people join. Dean is going to break down that framework in this training.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Think through some headlines you can use at the top of your application page.
List 5‐6 questions you want to ask your ideal client before they can join your small group, workshop or mastermind.
Think through your “What’s Next” sentence so your applicants know what to expect after they leave their info.
Lay out the value you can give on the confirmation page so they feel like they have learned from you already without even paying you a
dime.
Pick your gate‐keeper on your team or friends or family ﴾or learn to be your own gate‐keeper﴿
Get your gate‐keeper their questions and have them get comfortable repeating it.
After your gate‐keeper gets you a list of qualified candidates, do a little research on who they are and get to know them a little more.
